title: alstroemeria ligtu subsp. ligtu
intro: Alstroemeria ligtu subsp. ligtu, also known as the Peruvian Lily or Lily of the Incas, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Alstroemeria genus. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Alstroemeria ligtu subsp. ligtu include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, but further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
